creator: jharris@widomaker.com
text:
recent commit immediately gives a size mismatch, so update distinfo
	w/PGP-signed sources from author (or, at least, from the same key
	that signed the prior tarball for the port):

	===> Verifying PGP signature xshttpd-35b07.tar.bz2.asc
	gpg: armor header: Version: GnuPG v1.4.7 (FreeBSD)
	gpg: assuming signed data in `/home2/ports/distfiles//xshttpd-35b07.tar.bz2'
	gpg: Signature made Thu Apr 26 04:53:03 2007 EDT using RSA key ID 355F8408
	gpg: using subkey 355F8408 instead of primary key 7DA5C53B
	gpg: please do a --check-trustdb
	gpg: Good signature from "Johan van Selst <johans@...>"
	...
	gpg: WARNING: This key is not certified with a trusted signature!
	gpg:          There is no indication that the signature belongs to the owner.
	Primary key fingerprint: 3021 482B 52C1 3FFE 4752  4D57 68E1 252B 7DA5 C53B
     	Subkey fingerprint: C9D6 91AA 2B8A 733F 06AB  B1FF AB15 55FD 355F 8408
	gpg: binary signature, digest algorithm SHA1
	===> Valid sig. from expected ID 0xC9D691AA2B8A733F06ABB1FFAB1555FD355F8408.

Fix: -----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1
NotDashEscaped: You need GnuPG to verify this message

? Makefile.csig
? distinfo.csig
cvs server: Diffing .
